conversations.title: Prompt registry versioning
conversations.snippet: Align current and experimental prompt versions.

conversations.title: Insights UI readability
conversations.snippet: Remove decorative counters and noisy markers.

highlights: Prompt version governance and UI cleanup were synchronized to avoid contract drift between generation and rendering.
The eval pipeline now enforces strict weekly semantic checks instead of relying on parse success alone.
recurring_questions: How can version changes remain fast while eval coverage stays strict enough to block semantic regressions?

cross_domain_echoes.shared_logic: Both depend on explicit boundaries so that local changes cannot silently break downstream behavior.

unresolved_threads: Mixed-language sentence quality checks still need broader evaluation before full rollout.
suggested_focus: Create bilingual weekly cases that test strict semantic rules in both English and Chinese outputs.

evidence.note: Defined version labels and upgrade responsibilities.
Added strict weekly semantic scoring and gate logic.
